packet.claim: A generated discovery claim should advance to reusable discovery memory only when ambiguity, consequence class, readiness evidence, blocking evidence, provenance, uncertainty, and falsification route are explicit.
missingness: No real collaborator study has been run yet.
No domain expert calibration set is attached.
packet.revision_reason: GeneBench-Pro and related frontier systems emphasize ambiguity handling, consequential judgment, tool-grounded workflow reconstruction, and knowing when a result is decision-ready.
packet.human_decision_needed: Choose whether the claim should advance to reusable discovery memory, collaborator review, or remain in automated hypothesis testing.

ambiguity_register.ambiguity: The claim may be plausible but not decision-ready.
ambiguity_register.why_it_matters: Premature promotion can make later retrieval treat exploratory output as established infrastructure knowledge.
ambiguity_register.resolution_path: Require explicit readiness and blocking evidence before promotion.

decision_options.tradeoff: Higher reuse value but higher risk if ambiguity is under-specified.
decision_options.acceptance_criterion: Readiness evidence, blocking evidence, consequence class, provenance, and falsification route are complete.

decision_options.tradeoff: Lower immediate reuse but reduces unsupported memory promotion.
decision_options.acceptance_criterion: At least one readiness or ambiguity field is missing or too vague.

decision_readiness_evidence.evidence_needed: Curator can identify the decision surface and consequence class.
decision_readiness_evidence.measurement: Binary curator rating plus disagreement notes.
decision_readiness_evidence.decision_threshold: At least two independent reviewers agree the packet is review-ready.

blocking_evidence.blocker: Claim implies clinical, veterinary, or personal advice.
blocking_evidence.measurement: Presence of individual diagnosis, treatment, or care directive language.
blocking_evidence.downgrade_action: Block promotion and rewrite as research organization only.

measurable_variables.name: reviewer_decision_agreement
measurable_variables.measurement: percent agreement across reviewers on promote versus return decision

measurable_variables.name: unsupported_promotion_rate
measurable_variables.measurement: fraction of claims promoted without ambiguity, consequence, readiness evidence, blocking evidence, or falsification route

packet.falsification_route: If reviewer agreement and unsupported-promotion rate do not improve versus ungated promotion, the gate fails its purpose and must be revised.

provenance_chain.artifact: GeneBench-Pro, LABBench2, Co-Scientist, VETNET, privacy-preserving clinical data sources

packet.uncertainty_summary: The gate is grounded in frontier benchmark direction but remains unvalidated inside MC collaborator workflows.
packet.next_executable_action: Run this fixture through the validation CLI and wire the gate before discovery-memory promotion.

packet.claim: A plausible hypothesis is ready for collaborator review because it sounds promising.

ambiguity_register.why_it_matters: Reviewers cannot tell what action is requested.

decision_readiness_evidence.measurement: Count of options with tradeoff and acceptance criterion.

blocking_evidence.measurement: decision_options field missing or length below two.
blocking_evidence.downgrade_action: Reject packet until options are supplied.

packet.falsification_route: Reject if decision options are absent and reviewers cannot make a bounded choice.
packet.uncertainty_summary: The claim lacks enough structure for meaningful review.
packet.next_executable_action: Add at least two decision options with tradeoffs and acceptance criteria.

packet.claim: A private longitudinal record should be added to discovery review.
packet.revision_reason: Private status must not enter public-safe discovery artifacts.
packet.human_decision_needed: Choose whether private records can be reviewed.

ambiguity_register.why_it_matters: Repeated retrieval can leak sensitive longitudinal context.
ambiguity_register.resolution_path: Convert to synthetic-only or deidentified public-safe form.

decision_options.tradeoff: Protects privacy but blocks the packet.

measurable_variables.name: privacy_fail_count
measurable_variables.measurement: count of packets with non-public-safe privacy status

measurable_variables.name: deidentification_completion
measurable_variables.measurement: percent of required privacy fields completed

packet.falsification_route: Reject packets whose privacy_status is not explicitly public-safe, deidentified public-safe, or synthetic-only.
packet.uncertainty_summary: No uncertainty should override the privacy boundary.
packet.next_executable_action: Convert the packet into synthetic or deidentified public-safe form before review.

packet.claim: A research packet that implies personal medical or veterinary action should be promoted.
packet.revision_reason: Medical and veterinary content must remain research organization rather than care advice.
packet.human_decision_needed: Choose whether advice-like content can enter discovery memory.

ambiguity_register.why_it_matters: Could be retrieved later as action guidance.
ambiguity_register.resolution_path: Block or rewrite as research organization.

decision_options.tradeoff: Preserves research value but adds curation burden.

decision_readiness_evidence.decision_threshold: Zero diagnosis, treatment, or care directives.

blocking_evidence.blocker: Personal advice consequence class not blocked.

packet.falsification_route: If advice-like packets pass without blocked status, the gate fails.
packet.uncertainty_summary: The fixture intentionally violates the personal-advice boundary.
packet.next_executable_action: Set implementation_status to blocked or rewrite the packet as research organization only.
